items.name: utils
items.title: cn() utility
items.description: clsx + tailwind-merge class combiner.

items.name: icons
items.title: Phosphor icons (duotone)
items.description: The system's single icon voice — Phosphor, duotone by default. Built on Phosphor's SSR-safe icons and re-exported through one duotone() wrapper that owns the default weight (override per call with weight). Import names match Phosphor's catalog.

items.name: controllable-state
items.title: Controllable state hook
items.description: useControllableState — controlled/uncontrolled value helper for boolean, open, and selection props.

items.name: demo-viewport
items.title: Demo viewport context
items.description: Optional preview context for components that can inherit docs/demo viewport, density, frame, and shadow controls.

items.name: overflow-menu-item
items.title: Overflow menu item type
items.description: Shared OverflowMenuItem shape for video-card, up-next-item, and studio-video-row overflow menus.

items.name: toggle-state
items.title: Toggle state hook
items.description: ToggleState type and useToggleState — grouped controllable boolean for engagement and media controls.

items.name: foundation
items.title: Design system foundation
items.description: Complete self-contained base: warm paper neutrals + brand-derived green accent (override --brand to re-skin), status/warning/dock/chart/sidebar tokens, fixed agent-activity pastels, radius scale, and sans/mono/serif font tokens. Install via `shadcn init` so it owns :root.

theme.font-serif: var(--font-serif, ui-serif, "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino Linotype", Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif)

light.shadow-bevel-100: 1px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.13) inset, -1px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.13) inset, 0px -1px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.17) inset, 0px 1px 0px 0px rgba(204, 204, 204, 0.5) inset
light.shadow-inset-200: 0px 2px 1px 0px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.20) inset, 1px 0px 1px 0px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.12) inset, -1px 0px 1px 0px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.12) inset

dark.shadow-bevel-100: 1px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32) inset, -1px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32) inset, 0px -1px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.48) inset, 0px 1px 0px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24) inset
dark.shadow-inset-200: 0px 2px 1px 0px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.20) inset, 1px 0px 1px 0px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.12) inset, -1px 0px 1px 0px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.12) inset

.bg-grid.background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 12%, transparent) 1px, transparent 0)

.bg-grid-lines.background-image: linear-gradient(to right, color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 70%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 70%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px)

.glow-brand.background: radial-gradient(60% 60% at 50% 0%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand) 28%, transparent) 0%, transparent 70%)

.text-gradient.background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--foreground) 0%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 62%, transparent) 100%)

.mask-fade-x.mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, black 8%, black 92%, transparent)

.color-picker-alpha-fade.background-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 50%, transparent))

.scrim-bottom.background-image: linear-gradient(to top, color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 80%, transparent), color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 30%, transparent) 45%, transparent)

.scrim-top-background.background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, color-mix(in oklch, var(--background) 80%, transparent), transparent)

.scrim-bottom-background.background-image: linear-gradient(to top, var(--background), color-mix(in oklch, var(--background) 90%, transparent) 55%, transparent)

items.name: status-dot
items.title: Status dot
items.description: Atomic status indicator dot with tone + optional pulse.

items.name: entity-row
items.title: Entity row
items.description: Shared row primitive with leading, title, description, meta, status, actions, and accessible overlay activation.

items.name: activity-ring
items.title: Activity ring
items.description: Ring visualisation: a single-value score gauge (value) or an interactive segmented donut (segments) with hover/pin, tooltip, legend, and draw-in.

items.name: identity
items.title: Anonymous identity
items.description: Deterministic animal-name + OKLCH gradient from a seed string.

items.name: gradient-avatar
items.title: Gradient avatar
items.description: Radial-gradient avatar disc derived deterministically from a seed.

items.name: activity-grid
items.title: Activity grid
items.description: GitHub-style activity grid with density-aware cell sizing, shape variants, and brand intensity buckets.

items.name: filter-pill
items.title: Filter pill
items.description: Pill-with-chevron filter/range selector control.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented control
items.description: Inline segmented toggle (Referrer · Links · Campaign style).

items.name: timeline-rail
items.title: Timeline rail
items.description: Vertical event/timeline rail with connectors and terminal marker.

items.name: split-with-rail
items.title: Split with rail
items.description: Summary column + vertical event/timeline rail archetype shell.

items.name: app-shell
items.title: App shell
items.description: Variant-driven application layout scaffolds (dashboard, three-column, master-detail, docs, editor, holy-grail, command-center, and more) built from header/sidebar/panel/toolbar/aside/footer slots.

items.name: marketing-layout
items.title: Marketing layout
items.description: Variant-driven marketing/landing page scaffolds (landing, split-hero, centered, bento, pricing, feature-rows, article, docs, gallery, coming-soon) built from nav/hero/media/sections/footer slots.

items.name: hero-section
items.title: Hero section
items.description: Full-bleed hero composition shell.

items.name: metric-stat
items.title: Metric stat
items.description: Label + large value + delta badge metric row.

items.name: metric
items.title: Metric
items.description: Metric — label, value, hint, icon, and delta display primitive.

items.name: centered-focal
items.title: Centered focal
items.description: One centerpiece + floating card; first-run & single-action tools.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Button — design-system component.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Date picker built on react-day-picker, dressed in byronwade/ui tokens — selection follows --brand, the range bar uses bg-accent, and nav + day cells reuse buttonVariants.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard-key indicator (and KbdGroup for shortcut sequences) — mono, token-driven.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Pure-CSS loading spinner in currentColor with sm/default/lg sizes; role=status + aria-label.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button group
items.description: Joins related buttons into one segmented control with shared, overlapped edges; horizontal or vertical.

items.name: native-select
items.title: Native select
items.description: A styled native <select> with an inline chevron and the standard input affordance edge + focus ring — token-driven, no icon dependency.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Badge — design-system component.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Card — design-system component.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: Structured empty-state composite — centered header (media/title/description) and a CTA content slot, with default and muted-chip icon media variants.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Input — design-system component.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Textarea — design-system component.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Label — design-system component.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Select — design-system component.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox — design-system component.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Switch — design-system component.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Radio Group — design-system component.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Tooltip — design-system component.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Popover — design-system component.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Dropdown Menu — design-system component.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Dialog — design-system component.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Hover Card — design-system component.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Compound inline alert with title, description, icon slot, and action — plus intent tones (default, success, warning, destructive) on the semantic token system.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Linear progress bar (Base UI) with label + value and token-driven intent tones (default, brand, success, warning, destructive) on the indicator.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Skeleton — design-system component.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: Sonner — design-system component.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tabs — design-system component.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Accordion — design-system component.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Avatar — design-system component.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Separator — design-system component.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Breadcrumb — design-system component.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Table — design-system component.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Chart — design-system component.

items.name: status-pill
items.title: Status Pill
items.description: Status Pill — design-system component.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: Page Header — design-system component.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Stat Card — design-system component.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Empty State — design-system component.

items.name: detail-header
items.title: Detail Header
items.description: Detail Header — design-system component.

items.name: section
items.title: Section
items.description: Section — design-system component.

items.name: event-timeline
items.title: Event Timeline
items.description: Event Timeline — design-system component.

items.name: use-chrome-morph
items.title: useChromeMorph
items.description: Shared morph hook for floating chrome — sizes a container between its collapsed box and an open panel (width/height/border-radius), cross-fading rest and panel.

items.name: comms-store
items.title: Comms store
items.description: In-memory messaging backend for the Messages Cockpit layout — seeded mock data + reducer with simulated commit latency and an opt-in fake realtime feed. The swappable boundary for a real backend.

items.name: conversation-list
items.title: Conversation list
items.description: Messaging conversation list — live search, All/Unread/Pinned filters with counts, a pinned section, bulk select + bulk actions, and rows with hover actions. Reads/acts through comms-store.

items.name: message-thread
items.title: Message thread
items.description: Messaging thread pane — contact header, scrollable in/out bubbles with delivery ticks, reaction chips, and an empty state when no conversation is selected. Reads/acts through comms-store.

items.name: message-composer
items.title: Message composer
items.description: Messaging composer — auto-growing textarea, Enter to send, Shift+Enter newline, attachment affordance, and optional template/schedule callbacks. Calls send on comms-store.

items.name: morph-dock
items.title: Morph dock
items.description: Config-driven morphing navigation dock built on the useChromeMorph hook — compact/expand items that bloom in place into a consumer panel.

items.name: morph-surface
items.title: Morph Surface
items.description: Agnostic morph primitive — open-state orchestration (refs, cross-fade, Esc/outside-close, box sizing) with no visual style. Navigation styles compose it.

items.name: morph-bar
items.title: Morph Bar
items.description: Full-width top navigation bar that blooms a panel down via the morph technique.

items.name: morph-sidebar
items.title: Morph Sidebar
items.description: Left icon rail that morphs wider into a labeled sidebar via the morph technique.

items.name: morph-tabs
items.title: Morph Tabs
items.description: Bottom tab bar that blooms a sheet up via the morph technique.

items.name: morph-menubar
items.title: Morph Menubar
items.description: Slim menubar that blooms the active menu's dropdown in place via the morph technique.

items.name: morph-rail
items.title: Morph Rail
items.description: Right icon rail that blooms a wide labeled panel to the side via the morph technique.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Container that locks child content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Custom-styled scrollable viewport with optional scrollbars.

items.name: message-scroller
items.title: Message Scroller
items.description: Scroll container for chat conversations with anchored turns, streamed replies, prepend preservation, jump-to-message, and scroll controls.

items.name: message
items.title: Message
items.description: Chat message row layout with avatar, alignment, header, content, footer, and grouped messages.

items.name: bubble
items.title: Bubble
items.description: Message bubble surface with token variants, alignment, reactions, and collapsible content slots.

items.name: attachment
items.title: Attachment
items.description: File and image attachment card with media, metadata, upload state, actions, and a full-card trigger.

items.name: marker
items.title: Marker
items.description: Status updates, system notes, bordered rows, and labeled separators for streaming state and date breaks.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Expand/collapse region with trigger and animated panel.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Two-state pressable toggle button with variant and size styles.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Mutually exclusive or multi-select group of toggle buttons.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Grouped input shell with addons, buttons, and aligned controls.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Slide-over panel dialog anchored to any screen edge.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Command palette built on cmdk with dialog and input-group integration.

items.name: command-result
items.title: Command Result
items.description: Compact rich result row for a command palette: media, title, description, meta, and an action slot.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: Accessible site navigation with animated dropdown panels.

items.name: verification-progress
items.title: Verification Progress
items.description: Multi-step verification status tracker with tone-colored steps, optional counts, and connecting rails.

items.name: safari
items.title: Safari
items.description: Safari browser device mockup frame (SVG) wrapping a screenshot, image, or video — token-driven chrome, automatic dark mode. Adapted from MagicUI.

items.name: iphone
items.title: iPhone
items.description: iPhone device mockup frame (SVG) wrapping a screenshot, image, or video — token-driven chrome, automatic dark mode. Adapted from MagicUI.

items.name: android
items.title: Android
items.description: Android phone device mockup frame (SVG) wrapping a screenshot, image, or video — token-driven chrome, automatic dark mode. Adapted from MagicUI.

items.name: kinetic-text
items.title: Kinetic text
items.description: Per-letter kinetic typography: letters thicken (weight + text-stroke) and breathe on hover, with neighbours easing in sympathy. currentColor only, dark-mode safe. Adapted from MagicUI.

items.name: backlight
items.title: Backlight
items.description: Wraps a child in a saturated, blurred glow of its own pixels via an SVG filter — an RGB backlight that inherits the child’s token colors. Adapted from MagicUI.

items.name: world-map
items.title: World map
items.description: Dotted SVG world map with animated great-circle connection arcs. Arcs + points derive from --brand; dotted base resolves from --muted-foreground. Adapted from Aceternity UI.

items.name: floating-dock
items.title: Floating dock
items.description: macOS-style magnify-on-hover dock (desktop) + collapsible mobile dock, token surfaces and lucide icons. Adapted from Aceternity UI.

items.name: use-outside-click
items.title: useOutsideClick
items.description: Hook that fires a callback on pointer/touch interactions outside a ref. Adapted from Aceternity UI.

items.name: showcase-carousel
items.title: Showcase carousel
items.description: Horizontal carousel of cover cards that expand into a detail modal. Token surfaces with the edge hairline + depth, mono metadata eyebrows over editorial titles, lucide controls, focus-visible rings. Adapted from Aceternity UI.

items.name: pixelated-canvas
items.title: Pixelated canvas
items.description: Renders an image as an interactive grid of dots that distort around the pointer. Token-friendly defaults. Adapted from Aceternity UI.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Single or range slider built on Base UI — one thumb per value, token track/indicator, keyboard + a11y.

items.name: number-field
items.title: Number field
items.description: Numeric input with increment/decrement, clamping, scrub, and formatting — built on Base UI. Token surfaces, lucide steppers.

items.name: price-range-filter
items.title: Price range filter
items.description: Histogram + range slider + min/max number inputs + apply button. Composes slider, number-field, button. Adapted from a coss.com UI block.

items.name: file-tree
items.title: File tree
items.description: Collapsible file/folder tree with selection, sorting, and expand-all, plus a `panel` variant (chevron disclosure, guide lines, count badges) and `multi`-select with cascading checkboxes — rebuilt on Base UI (collapsible). Base adapted from MagicUI; panel/multi-select an original implementation inspired by Untitled UI.

items.name: cursor
items.title: Cursor
items.description: Live collaboration cursor — pointer + name/message body, tinted via currentColor. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: pill
items.title: Pill
items.description: Rounded pill with avatar/status/indicator/delta parts; tones map to success/destructive/warning/brand tokens. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: glimpse
items.title: Glimpse
items.description: Link/preview hover card (title, description, image) built on the house hover-card. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: ticker
items.title: Ticker
items.description: Stock/crypto ticker — icon, symbol, formatted price, and up/down change (success/destructive tokens). Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: relative-time
items.title: Relative time
items.description: Multi-timezone live clock — per-zone time/date display with mono labels, ticking each second. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: qr-code
items.title: QR code
items.description: Token-colored QR code (modules use --foreground/--background, so it re-skins). Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: rating
items.title: Rating
items.description: Interactive star rating (keyboard + hover) plus a read-only RatingBadge (score + star). Tone follows --brand. Adapted from kibo-ui (+ Untitled UI-style badge).

items.name: credit-card
items.title: Credit card
items.description: Flippable credit-card display (chip, number, expiry, CVV, mag stripe, payment icon). Token body that re-skins; legible in both themes. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: image-crop
items.title: Image crop
items.description: Crop a File to a PNG (react-image-crop + canvas); apply/reset controls, token crop chrome. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color picker
items.description: HSL color picker with a 2D saturation/lightness field, hue and alpha sliders, an eyedropper, and hex/rgb/css/hsl format output. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: video-player
items.title: Video player
items.description: YouTube-grade media-chrome video player: composable parts (settings/quality/captions menus, fullscreen, PiP, scrub preview, chapters, heatmap, ambient, end-screen) plus a batteries-included MediaPlayer preset with resume, keyboard/gesture smarts, and default/minimal/theater/poster/youtube variants. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: equalizer-bars
items.title: Equalizer bars
items.description: Animated now-playing equalizer bars. Accent follows --brand; freezes under prefers-reduced-motion. The shared playing-state primitive for album-cover, track-row, and now-playing-bar.

items.name: album-cover
items.title: Album cover
items.description: Square album/playlist artwork with an optional hover-reveal brand play button and an equalizer overlay for the active state. Accent follows --brand.

items.name: audio-waveform
items.title: Audio waveform
items.description: Bar-style waveform scrubber. Played bars follow --brand; click and arrow keys report a 0–1 seek ratio. Exposes role=slider with aria-value*.

items.name: track-list
items.title: Track list
items.description: Numbered song rows (TrackList + TrackRow). The index swaps to a play glyph on hover and to equalizer-bars when active. Active title and like follow --brand.

items.name: lyrics
items.title: Lyrics
items.description: Synced, scrolling lyric lines. The active line is emphasised and scrolls into view (instant under prefers-reduced-motion). Lines become seek-to-line buttons when onLineClick is set.

items.name: now-playing-bar
items.title: Now playing bar
items.description: Sticky transport bar composed from album-cover + slider. Controlled parts: NowPlayingBarTrack, NowPlayingBarControls, NowPlayingBarProgress, NowPlayingBarExtras. Active controls follow --brand.

items.name: audio-player
items.title: Audio player
items.description: Token-mapped media-chrome <audio> player with a composable control bar and default/minimal/card variants. Audio sibling of video-player; accent follows --brand.

items.name: playlist-card
items.title: Playlist card
items.description: Browse-grid tile composing album-cover + title + description. Surfaces the cover's hover play button and active equalizer; lifts on hover.

items.name: artist-header
items.title: Artist header
items.description: Artist hero composing album-cover + verified badge + monthly-listeners stat (font-mono) + Play/Follow buttons. Editorial name typography; Play follows --brand.

items.name: kanban
items.title: Kanban
items.description: Drag-and-drop kanban board with columns, sortable cards, and accessible drag announcements. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: gantt
items.title: Gantt
items.description: Draggable timeline / roadmap chart with a sidebar, multi-range header, status-tinted feature bars, milestone diamonds, and a today line. Auto-centers on today; a GanttControls toolbar drives timescale + zoom, with density and read-only presentation variants. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: editor
items.title: Editor
items.description: A Tiptap rich-text editor with a bubble toolbar, slash command menu, tables, task lists, and syntax-highlighted code blocks. Adapted from kibo-ui.

items.name: design-rules
items.title: Design-system AI rules
items.description: Drops a Cursor rule into the project so AI agents always build and edit UI with the @byronwade/ui design system (components + tokens, no hardcoded colors). Add it once with `npx shadcn add @byronwade/design-rules`.

items.name: ai-loader
items.title: AI Loader
items.description: Spinning multi-opacity loader for AI/agent surfaces (adapted from AI Elements).

items.name: ai-shimmer
items.title: AI Shimmer
items.description: Animated text-shimmer that sweeps a token-driven light gradient across muted text for AI thinking/streaming states.

items.name: ai-suggestion
items.title: AI Suggestion
items.description: A horizontally-scrolling row of clickable prompt pills that surface suggested actions for an AI chat or agent surface.

items.name: ai-image
items.title: AI Image
items.description: Renders an AI-generated image from the Experimental_GeneratedImage shape as an edge-framed, radius-clipped data URI (adapted from AI Elements).

items.name: ai-open-in-chat
items.title: Open in Chat
items.description: A dropdown menu that opens the current prompt or query in external AI chat providers (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Scira, T3, v0).

items.name: ai-inline-citation
items.title: AI Inline Citation
items.description: Inline text citations that reveal a hover card carousel of grounded sources with titles, URLs, and quotes (adapted from Vercel AI Elements).

items.name: ai-context
items.title: AI Context
items.description: Hover-card token/cost usage meter for AI model context windows (adapted from Vercel AI Elements).

items.name: ai-code-block
items.title: AI Code Block
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code surface with light/dark Shiki rendering, optional line numbers, and a copy-to-clipboard button (adapted from Vercel AI Elements).

items.name: ai-task
items.title: AI Task
items.description: A collapsible task log showing an AI agent's step-by-step actions with inline file chips, ported from Vercel AI Elements.

items.name: ai-sources
items.title: AI Sources
items.description: A collapsible citation list that reveals the sources an AI response was grounded in, built on the Base UI collapsible primitive.

items.name: ai-model-selector
items.title: AI Model Selector
items.description: A searchable command-palette dialog for choosing an AI model, with provider logos, grouped items, and keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: ai-confirmation
items.title: AI Confirmation
items.description: A tool-call approval prompt that requests, then reflects, an accepted or rejected agent action using AI SDK approval state.

items.name: ai-checkpoint
items.title: AI Checkpoint
items.description: A conversation checkpoint marker that pairs a bookmark icon with a tooltip-enabled restore trigger and a trailing separator.

items.name: ai-plan
items.title: AI Plan
items.description: Collapsible plan card for AI/agent surfaces with a streaming-aware title and description (adapted from AI Elements).

items.name: ai-queue
items.title: AI Queue
items.description: A collapsible task-queue surface for AI agents, with pending/completed status indicators, descriptions, hover action buttons, and image/file attachments.

items.name: ai-conversation
items.title: AI Conversation
items.description: An auto-scrolling chat transcript that sticks to the bottom as messages stream, with content, empty-state, and scroll-to-bottom affordances.

items.name: ai-reasoning
items.title: AI Reasoning
items.description: A collapsible "thinking" trace for AI responses that auto-opens while streaming, records elapsed seconds, and renders its markdown reasoning through Streamdown.

items.name: ai-tool
items.title: AI Tool
items.description: Collapsible tool-call card that shows a tool's status, JSON parameters, and result or error output for agent chat UIs.

items.name: ai-message
items.title: AI Message
items.description: Chat message primitives for AI conversations — bubbles, actions, branch navigation, attachments, and a streaming markdown response.

items.name: ai-chain-of-thought
items.title: AI Chain of Thought
items.description: A collapsible, step-by-step reasoning trace for AI responses with status-coded steps, search-result chips, and captioned image wells.

items.name: ai-artifact
items.title: AI Artifact
items.description: A framed surface for presenting generated artifacts (code, files, canvases) in a chat with a titled header, tooltip actions, a close button, and scrollable content.

items.name: ai-node
items.title: AI Node
items.description: A React Flow node rendered as a Card with editorial header/footer and token-styled source/target connection handles.

items.name: ai-edge
items.title: AI Edge
items.description: React Flow custom edges: a dashed temporary connector and an animated edge with a brand dot traveling along the path.

items.name: ai-panel
items.title: AI Panel
items.description: A React Flow overlay panel that floats over the flow canvas, pinned to a configurable corner.

items.name: ai-canvas
items.title: AI Canvas
items.description: A React Flow node-graph surface with opinionated interaction defaults and a token-driven, pattern-configurable background for agent/workflow UIs.

items.name: ai-controls
items.title: AI Controls
items.description: Token-styled React Flow zoom / fit-view / interactivity control panel for AI canvas surfaces (adapted from AI Elements).

items.name: ai-prompt-input
items.title: AI Prompt Input
items.description: A composable AI chat prompt input with density-aware composer layout, textarea, file attachments, action menu, model select, speech-to-text, and slash-command primitives built on byronwade/ui input-group, select, dropdown-menu, hover-card, and command.

items.name: ai-toolbar
items.title: AI Toolbar
items.description: A token-driven floating action toolbar that attaches to a React Flow custom node, with horizontal/vertical orientation variants.

items.name: ai-attachments
items.title: Attachments
items.description: A compound component for displaying file, media, and source-document attachments in grid, inline, or list layouts with previews, remove buttons, and hover-card details.

items.name: ai-connection
items.title: AI Connection
items.description: Token-styled React Flow connection line for AI canvas/workflow surfaces (adapted from AI Elements).

items.name: ai-web-preview
items.title: AI Web Preview
items.description: An embedded browser-style web preview with URL bar, navigation, and a console log for AI-generated sites (adapted from AI Elements).

items.name: video-player-utils
items.title: Video player utils
items.description: Pure, DOM-free helpers for the video player: resume/watch-memory, the extra keymap, tap gestures, chapters→VTT, heatmap math, and the media-action applier.

items.name: market
items.title: Market utils
items.description: Pure, DOM-free market helpers for the TradingView-style set: chart geometry (candles, depth, volume profile, footprint, polyline/area paths), price/percent/volume/time formatting, change tones, and deterministic seeded mock generators (candles, quotes, order books, time-and-sales rows, symbol stats, footprint rows, options chain rows, series).

items.name: chart-theme
items.title: Chart theme bridge
items.description: Maps byronwade/ui foundation CSS tokens to TradingView Lightweight Charts options and converts market candle data to LW series payloads.

items.name: sparkline
items.title: Sparkline
items.description: Compact inline trend chart (line or filled area) rendered from a numeric series; tone auto-derives from first→last value (success/destructive/muted) or is set explicitly (incl. brand).

items.name: price-change
items.title: Price change
items.description: Signed price/percent change with a runtime-derived tone (success/destructive/muted from sign + neutralThreshold) and trend caret. `format` absolute/percent/both, `size` sm/default/lg, and a `chip` variant for a tinted pill. Reused across the TradingView-style set.

items.name: candlestick-chart
items.title: Candlestick chart
items.description: Token-themed OHLC candlestick chart rendered in-house as SVG: bullish candles success-toned, bearish destructive-toned, an optional bottom volume band, a background grid, and an optional crosshair. All geometry is computed by the pure `market` lib from numeric props, so it renders deterministically.

items.name: lightweight-chart
items.title: Lightweight chart
items.description: Pro financial chart primitive powered by TradingView Lightweight Charts — token-mapped candlestick, line, and area series with optional volume histogram, crosshair, pan/zoom, and `fill` mode for terminal layouts. Theme colors resolve from foundation CSS variables at runtime.

items.name: depth-chart
items.title: Depth chart
items.description: Token-themed market-depth chart rendered in-house as SVG: cumulative bid depth (success-toned) mirrored against cumulative ask depth (destructive-toned) about a dashed midline. All geometry is computed by the pure `market` lib (`cumulativeDepthPath`) from numeric props, so it renders deterministically.

items.name: order-book
items.title: Order book
items.description: Token-themed DOM ladder for bid/ask depth: proportional depth bars (success bid, destructive ask), a spread row, split or vertical layout, and optional row-click price selection. Defaults to a seeded book from the `market` lib.

items.name: heatmap-grid
items.title: Heatmap grid
items.description: Performance heatmap grid with cell area sized by weight and color toned by change magnitude — either success/destructive opacity buckets or the `--chart-1…5` ramp. Seeded defaults from the `market` lib; optional cell selection callback.

items.name: ticker-tape
items.title: Ticker tape
items.description: Horizontally scrolling market ticker marquee — composes the ticker primitive into a seamless loop with speed and pause controls.

items.name: quote-header
items.title: Quote header
items.description: Symbol quote header — large mono price, price-change chip, optional sparkline, and metric-stat row for open/high/low/volume/mkt cap.

items.name: chart-toolbar
items.title: Chart toolbar
items.description: Trading chart toolbar — symbol button, interval segmented-control, chart-type toggle group, and indicators action.

items.name: chart-panel
items.title: Chart panel
items.description: Chart panel composite — chart-toolbar atop an SVG candlestick/sparkline chart (default) or `engine="pro"` lightweight-chart with controlled/uncontrolled interval and chart type.

items.name: watchlist
items.title: Watchlist
items.description: Market watchlist table — symbol rows with last price, price-change, sparkline, and volume columns; optional row selection.

items.name: market-depth
items.title: Market depth
items.description: Market depth panel — stacks or splits depth-chart and order-book with panel/terminal variants, compact density, header metrics, empty/footer slots, chart sizing, book layout, and price-select passthrough.

items.name: order-entry
items.title: Order entry
items.description: Buy/sell order ticket — side tabs, order-type segmented control, qty input, money price field, computed total, and submit action.

items.name: position-card
items.title: Position card
items.description: Open position card — symbol, side badge, size/entry/mark, unrealized P&L via price-change, optional close action.

items.name: positions-table
items.title: Positions table
items.description: Open positions table — side badges, mono numerals, P&L via price-change, optional footer aggregate and close/select callbacks.

items.name: portfolio-summary
items.title: Portfolio summary
items.description: Portfolio overview — total value stat card, day change via price-change, equity sparkline, and token-tinted allocation bars.

items.name: trade-history
items.title: Trade history
items.description: Trade fills table — relative-time stamp, symbol, buy/sell badge, price, size, computed value, optional row select.

items.name: market-movers
items.title: Market movers
items.description: Gainers, losers, and most-active tabs — each row shows last price, price-change, and sparkline with optional symbol select.

items.name: screener-table
items.title: Screener table
items.description: Market screener — index-filters views plus sortable index-table columns for price, change, volume, market cap, and sparkline.

items.name: economic-calendar
items.title: Economic calendar
items.description: Macro event calendar grouped by day — time, country, impact badge, and actual/forecast/prior mono readings.

items.name: market-news
items.title: Market news
items.description: News feed rows — source avatar, headline, relative-time, sentiment badge, related-symbol price-change chips, header/action/footer slots, list/grid layouts, terminal variant, filtering, loading, empty, selected, and disabled states.

items.name: price-alert
items.title: Price alert
items.description: Price alert list — condition text, active/triggered status dot, enable switch, and optional delete action.

items.name: symbol-search
items.title: Symbol search
items.description: Symbol command palette — grouped search results with price-change, keyboard hints, and cmdk filtering.

items.name: volume-profile
items.title: Volume profile
items.description: Session volume profile rendered in-house as SVG — horizontal histogram bars from candle OHLCV via the `market` lib, optional point-of-control line on `--chart-1` / `--brand`.

items.name: time-and-sales
items.title: Time and sales
items.description: Compact time-and-sales tape — mono time, side-toned price, and size rows with optional relative-time stamps and row select.

items.name: symbol-details
items.title: Symbol details
items.description: Symbol fundamentals panel — quote-header, exchange/sector meta, and tabbed overview/financials/statistics metric-stat grids.

items.name: chart-layout-grid
items.title: Chart layout grid
items.description: Multi-chart layout shell — 1×2 or 2×2 grid of chart-panel slots with bordered panel frames.

items.name: indicator-legend
items.title: Indicator legend
items.description: Active chart indicators list — swatch, visibility switch, optional remove, and hidden badge.

items.name: drawing-toolbar
items.title: Drawing toolbar
items.description: Chart drawing tool rail — vertical or horizontal toggle group with tooltip-labeled trendline, fib, text, and shape tools.

items.name: compare-symbols
items.title: Compare symbols
items.description: Compare overlay header — symbol chips with price-change percent, optional add/remove actions, and max cap.

items.name: volume-footprint
items.title: Volume footprint
items.description: Order-flow footprint chart — bid (success) and ask (destructive) volume bars mirrored about a dashed midline; geometry from `footprintGeometry` in the `market` lib.

items.name: options-chain
items.title: Options chain
items.description: Options chain table — calls/puts tabs, strike column, mono bid/ask/last, price-change percent, optional strike select.

items.name: alert-create-form
items.title: Alert create form
items.description: Create price alert dialog — symbol, above/below condition, money-input target, notify switch, and submit callback.

items.name: session-stats-bar
items.title: Session stats bar
items.description: Compact OHLCV status row for the active or hovered candle — mono labels with success/destructive close tone.

items.name: replay-controls
items.title: Replay controls
items.description: Bar replay transport — play/pause, step, scrub slider, and speed segmented control with callbacks only.

items.name: sector-rotation
items.title: Sector rotation
items.description: Sector performance donut — change-toned SVG arcs with legend and hover focus, geometry from `sectorRotationArcs` in the `market` lib.

items.name: money-input
items.title: Money input
items.description: Currency-formatted price input built on the number-field primitive, with a leading symbol and optional ISO-code adornment.

items.name: bulk-action-bar
items.title: Bulk action bar
items.description: Selection action bar for tables and resource lists — a selected-count label, promoted and grouped actions, and a clear-selection control. Renders nothing when nothing is selected.

items.name: order-summary
items.title: Order summary
items.description: Order line-items list with a subtotal, discount, shipping, tax, and total cost breakdown. The signature Shopify order/checkout card.

items.name: product-card
items.title: Product card
items.description: Products-index product tile — image, title, status badge with status dot, price with optional compare-at, and inventory state.

items.name: variant-picker
items.title: Variant picker
items.description: Product option/variant selector — one labelled toggle-group row per option with unavailable values disabled.

items.name: inventory-bar
items.title: Inventory bar
items.description: Stock-level indicator composing the progress primitive — a count plus a tonal bar for in-stock, low-stock, and out-of-stock states.

items.name: customer-card
items.title: Customer card
items.description: Customer summary card — avatar, name and email, orders and lifetime-spend stats, and a default address.

items.name: fulfillment-tracker
items.title: Fulfillment tracker
items.description: Order status header — payment and fulfillment status pills plus an optional fulfillment step rail. Models Shopify's dual payment/fulfillment status.

items.name: index-table
items.title: Index table
items.description: Sortable, row-selectable data table with an integrated bulk-action bar, sticky header, loading and empty states, and pagination. The signature Shopify-admin index.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data table
items.description: Shopify-grade admin table shell with index filters, bulk selection, sortable columns, and pagination.

items.name: resource-list
items.title: Resource list
items.description: List-view of selectable rich rows (ResourceList + ResourceItem) — media, title, metadata, badges, hover actions, bulk selection. The list counterpart of index-table.

items.name: index-filters
items.title: Index filters
items.description: Filter bar for an index: saved-view tabs, search, sort dropdown, and removable applied-filter pills. Pairs with index-table / resource-list.

items.name: tag-input
items.title: Tag input
items.description: Tags field — type to add chips (Enter/comma), remove with × or Backspace, optional autocomplete suggestions, sizes, and error state.

items.name: drop-zone
items.title: Drop zone
items.description: Drag-and-drop file/media upload with drag-over and rejected-file states, image preview thumbnails or a file list, and size variants.

items.name: banner
items.title: Banner
items.description: Prominent inline status message with tone (info/success/warning/critical), title, body, actions, and dismiss. Distinct from the compact alert.

items.name: thumbnail
items.title: Thumbnail
items.description: Video thumbnail tile with optional duration pill, watched-progress bar, and live chip.

items.name: verified-badge
items.title: Verified badge
items.description: Inline verified check shown next to channel or author names, with default check-seal and artist music-seal variants.

items.name: live-badge
items.title: Live badge
items.description: A YouTube-style LIVE indicator pill with an optional pulsing dot and compact-formatted concurrent-viewer count.

items.name: subscribe-button
items.title: Subscribe button
items.description: YouTube-style subscribe control with a two-state toggle and a notification-level dropdown menu.

items.name: chip-bar
items.title: Chip bar
items.description: YouTube-style single-select horizontal filter chip bar with edge fade and scroll affordance.

items.name: action-rail
items.title: Action rail
items.description: Vertical or horizontal stack of icon and compact-count action buttons — a YouTube Shorts-style like/comment/share rail.

items.name: video-card
items.title: Video card
items.description: YouTube-style vertical video tile composing a thumbnail, channel byline, compact view/timestamp meta, and an overflow menu.

items.name: video-shelf
items.title: Video shelf
items.description: Titled, horizontally-scrolling content row with edge-fade, chevron controls, and an optional action — the YouTube home/category shelf.

items.name: channel-header
items.title: Channel header
items.description: YouTube-style channel page header with banner, avatar, verified handle and counts, subscribe/join actions, and section tabs.

items.name: up-next-item
items.title: Up next item
items.description: Compact horizontal video row for watch-page up-next lists and search results, composing a thumbnail with title, channel, view/timestamp meta, and an overflow menu.

items.name: channel-byline
items.title: Channel byline
items.description: Watch-page channel identity row: avatar, name with verified badge and subscriber count, plus a SubscribeButton and optional action slot.

items.name: engagement-bar
items.title: Engagement bar
items.description: YouTube-style watch-page action row: connected like/dislike segmented pill, plus share, save, custom action, and overflow-menu pills.

items.name: description-box
items.title: Description box
items.description: YouTube watch-page description panel with a views/date header and collapsible body text that expands via "...more" / "Show less".

items.name: watch-layout
items.title: Watch layout
items.description: YouTube watch-page scaffold: primary column (player, title, meta, description, comments) plus an optional xl sidebar rail for chip filters and up-next lists.

items.name: watch-meta-bar
items.title: Watch meta bar
items.description: Watch-page meta row pairing channel identity (left) with engagement actions (right) — the strip under the title on YouTube.

items.name: comment
items.title: Comment
items.description: A YouTube-style threaded comment with author, like/dislike, reply, pinned/creator-heart tags, and a replies disclosure.

items.name: comment-composer
items.title: Comment composer
items.description: YouTube-style comment composer: an avatar plus an underline text input that reveals Cancel/Comment actions on focus or input.

items.name: shorts-player
items.title: Shorts player
items.description: A YouTube Shorts-style vertical 9:16 player with a right-side engagement rail and a bottom-left author, caption, and sound overlay.

items.name: mini-player
items.title: Mini player
items.description: Picture-in-picture mini player card with a play/pause poster overlay, progress, and close/expand controls.

items.name: chapter-list
items.title: Chapter list
items.description: A YouTube-style chapter list with timestamps, thumbnails, and an active chapter derived from the playhead.

items.name: playback-menu
items.title: Playback menu
items.description: YouTube-style player settings menu: gear-triggered dropdown of setting groups (quality, speed, subtitles), each opening a single-select radio submenu.

items.name: studio-video-row
items.title: Studio video row
items.description: A YouTube Studio content-table row composing a selection checkbox, thumbnail, title/description, visibility status, date, and compact mono view/comment/like metrics with an overflow menu.

items.name: studio-video-table
items.title: Studio video table
items.description: YouTube Studio content-table shell: select-all header with sortable date/views/comments/likes columns wrapping `studio-video-row` children.

items.name: upload-row
items.title: Upload row
items.description: YouTube Studio-style upload/processing row: preview, filename, progress bar, status badge, and a cancel/retry action.

items.name: comment-moderation-row
items.title: Comment moderation row
items.description: A YouTube Studio comment-moderation row with approve/remove/heart/reply actions, a status tag, and optional video context.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useIsMobile
items.description: Hook that tracks viewport width against a 768px breakpoint for responsive sidebar and layout patterns. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Accessible pagination nav with previous/next links, page links, and ellipsis — composes button variants for consistent focus rings. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Filterable autocomplete built on Base UI Combobox — input-group trigger, popup list with groups, empty state, and optional multi-select chips. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context menu
items.description: Right-click menu built on Base UI ContextMenu — items, checkbox/radio groups, submenus, shortcuts, and destructive variant. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Drag-to-resize panel groups with horizontal/vertical orientation and an optional visible handle — built on react-resizable-panels. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Form field layout primitives — FieldGroup, Field, label, description, error, fieldset/legend, and responsive horizontal orientation via container queries. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: One-time-password input with grouped slots, caret blink, separator, and aria-invalid styling — built on input-otp. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Embla-powered carousel with keyboard navigation, previous/next controls, and horizontal or vertical orientation. Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date picker
items.description: Single-date picker — outline trigger opens a popover calendar; controlled or uncontrolled value with date-fns formatting.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Collapsible application sidebar with provider context, mobile sheet fallback, icon/offcanvas modes, menu groups, and keyboard shortcut (⌘/Ctrl+B). Adapted from shadcn/ui.

items.name: all
items.title: All components
items.description: The entire byronwade/ui catalog in one install. Run `init` against foundation first, then add this to pull every component (dependencies resolve automatically).
